title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving from Guest to Account linked to a Tenant
scenario: Support data (app version, tenant name, tenant id, user id, last connected) is correctly displayed in Poly Lens Menu > Support > App section after switching from Guest account to Tenant-linked account
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, ensure the app is in Guest mode (no tenant linked).
3. Tap the Menu icon (hamburger) on the Home screen.
5. In the Support screen, tap the App section.
6. Observe and note the displayed support data: app version, tenant name, tenant id, user id, last connected.
8. Navigate to Account settings and sign in with credentials linked to a Tenant.
9. After successful login, tap the Menu icon (hamburger) again.
11. Observe the displayed support data again.
expected: After moving from a Guest account to an account linked to a Tenant, the Support > App section correctly displays the updated support data: app version, tenant name, tenant id, user id, and last connected, reflecting the tenant-linked account.
